reviews.review_title: Calming, enjoyable and an authentic feel
reviews.review_description: I have had this on my headset for some time, but the notification of the addition of the Van Gogh collection prompted me to try it again and I really enjoyed the Art Gallery VR experience much more this time. Also I found that teleporting near to the picture first, and then naturally walking up and scanning / moving my head across the picture / canvas, the experience felt comfortable (no motion sickness this way, something I experience when using the left controller gliding / walking method of motion) and it felt much more like an authentic visit to a modern art gallery, and the music added nice ambience  too.. I will definitely visit more often!  Really good job developers 👍

reviews.review_title: GREAT CULTURAL HD VR EXPERIENCE IN ART
reviews.review_description: The Art Gallery VR lets you explore beautifully presented virtual art exhibitions, offering detailed descriptions and a calm, intuitive experience. Ideal for art lovers or curious explorers seeking a relaxed cultural journey in VR. Awesome!

“ THE ART GALLERY VR “ IS A MASTERPIECE IN IT’S OWN RIGHT .

“ JUST LIKE HAVING YOUR OWN MUSEUM … , OPEN 24 HOUR’S , A DAY ! “ . 

PLEASE MAKE A MILLION MORE LIKE THIS … , PLEASE !!!

The most wonderful relaxing app. Music good. Images good. Sharp. As sharp as the Alphonse Mucha painting in the Residence environment in Big Screen VR.
This app is a gift to the world.
Perhaps rotating traveling exhibits. It would be great to see an Emily Carr art display, Group of Seven, Andrew Wyeth, Maxfield Parrish, etc
Merci beaucoup pour cette exhibitione artistique.

It’s an ‘I can do this’ simple app, almost seems like a project for a class.

Pros: 
Solid programming- no bad clipping or mapping. 
Appreciation of art by 3 artists. 
Decent graphics. 

Cons:
Cannot adjust height
Very limited
Not customizable- I wish I could display my artwork. 
Only one configuration of a room

I hope you keep going and make this into something unique and meaningful.

developer_response.body: Give it a go now, added a lot of new things that I am sure you will enjoy :)

reviews.review_description: I feel grateful to be getting this for free.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I am very happy to hear you enjoyed it, it was my first VR project, and seeing your positive reaction to it has inspired me to start work on the next one. Have a wonderful day!

reviews.review_title: Simple, solid and worth the price
reviews.review_description:
For under $5 this is worth it. Easy to navigate and it recreates a pleasant gallery experience. 
Definitely agree that we need more artist options!
In times when seeing the art masters in galleries is hard to come by this app provides high quality reproductions in a museum setting that is easy to navigate.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I am very happy to hear you enjoyed it, it was my first VR project, and seeing your positive reaction to it has inspired me to start work on the next one. Have a wonderful day!
